action.description: Deprecate the recovery-agent persona due to low citation count (0 citations in 90+ days)

anticipated_harms.description: Future recovery scenarios may need this persona and it won't be available
anticipated_harms.mitigation: Archive rather than delete. Deprecation is reversible — persona can be reinstated if needed.

undecidable_aspects: Whether future scenarios will require this persona's specific capabilities
logotron_check.metalanguage_risk: None — deprecation of a persona does not affect the governance framework itself.
